description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service. Define a before_script that runs ls -la before each job. In the build stage add a job named "Download and build binary" that pulls the java:7 image and compiles JavProg.java with javac -d . JavProg.java inside a mounted container. In the test stage add a job named "Executing binary code" that also pulls java:7, recompiles the source, lists files, runs the compiled program with java learnjava.JavProg, and disassembles it with javap learnjava.JavProg, all using docker run with the current directory mounted, and no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
